message:
Bump version to 0.1.24 for release

Includes changes since v0.1.23:
- Comprehensive README expansion with architecture deep-dives
  - Performance engineering documentation (caching, bloom filters, warming)
  - Connector interface with mermaid class diagram
  - TUI engine internals (state machine, async loop, debouncing)
  - Append-only storage strategy documentation
  - Installer strategy and environment configuration
  - Troubleshooting guide
  - Developer workflow and contributing guidelines
  - Deep-dive technical reference for all subsystems

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.1.23"
+version = "0.1.24"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Coding Agent Team"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
